overall.description: Gameplay footage from Grand Theft Auto V showing a character walking through a Los Santos park on a sunny afternoon. The journey begins along a lakeside gravel path with downtown skyscrapers visible in the distance, transitions through a landscaped park area with benches and palm trees, and ends with a street crossing into a residential neighborhood with light vehicle traffic.

transition from gravel path to grassy edge near the water

tall palm trees lining the park perimeter

wooden power poles with overhead electrical wires

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view of a downtown skyline through palm trees as the character walks along a gravel path beside a canal. The character passes a hot dog vendor and a person in red standing on the grass, with suburban houses visible to the left and utility poles lining the path.

events.description: passing several white park benches with people seated
pedestrian in green jacket walks past the camera from right to left

agents.ego_description: continuing along the curved lakeside promenade, glancing at seated individuals

notable_agents.action: person in green jacket and red pants walking while looking at phone
person sitting on white concrete bench facing the water

entered.detail: white concrete benches positioned along the path edge
large advertisement billboard visible on the grassy hillside

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a curved gravel promenade beside the water, passing white benches where people are seated. A pedestrian in a green jacket walks past while looking at their phone, and a billboard becomes visible on the distant hillside as the downtown skyline fades from view.

scene_state.functional_zone: park interior transitioning to street approach

events.description: passing a pedestrian in yellow shirt walking in opposite direction

landscaped area with large rocks and shrubs

segments.scene_description: Moving away from the water, the character walks through an open park area with landscaped rock gardens and yellow bollards marking the path. The character passes a pedestrian in a yellow shirt and approaches a street corner where a second hot dog vendor is positioned.

events.description: crossing the asphalt street at the intersection
white sports car drives past on the road

agents.ego_description: crossing the street and continuing along the sidewalk, observing passing vehicles

notable_agents.action: white sports car driving along the residential street
two women walking together on the sidewalk

entered.detail: cracked asphalt street with white and red painted crosswalk lines
low stone retaining wall along the sidewalk edge
cars parked along the curb of the residential street

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the asphalt road at an intersection, passing the street-side hot dog vendor, and continues along a residential sidewalk. A white sports car drives past on the road, and the scene features stone walls, parked vehicles, and suburban homes with palm trees lining the street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a scenic lakeside promenade toward a quiet residential neighborhood under a bright afternoon sky. It begins along a gravel path beside a canal, passing a hot dog vendor and pedestrians while the downtown skyline is framed by palm trees. As the camera follows the curve of the promenade, the city skyline fades from view and is replaced by a distant hillside billboard and white benches lining the waterfront. The scene then shifts away from the water into an open park area characterized by landscaped rock gardens and yellow bollards before approaching a street corner. Finally, the camera crosses an asphalt intersection past another vendor and moves onto a residential sidewalk, where a white sports car drives by amidst stone walls and suburban homes.
